parameters.prompt: One photorealistic modular orbital-station deck bay, exactly 2.4 m wide, 3.0 m long and 0.22 m thick. Flat load-bearing underside, framed removable non-slip walking panels, flush cargo tie-down sockets, narrow utility channels, sealed access covers, threshold-compatible edges, realistic panel gaps, fasteners and bevels. Clear uninterrupted 1.5 m central walking strip, isolated single object, top faces +Y. No walls, ceiling, furniture, loose cables, text, logo, stand, ground, or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit station deck materials: dark graphite non-slip panels, zinc-gray structural frame, brushed steel tie-downs, restrained amber edge markings without symbols, localized foot and cargo wear, no baked lighting, pseudo-text, logos, broad dirt, or emissive glow.

reasons: geometry is an L-shaped wall-and-floor chunk rather than a thin rectangular deck bay
thickness is too large and the central walking strip is interrupted by vertical structure
